app.program_finished_incomplete: Program finished — not all goals activated

level_error.title: Execution Failed
level_error.default_msg: The explorer couldn't reach the destination. Check your sequence!

1.name: First Steps
1.description: Walk forward and activate the goal tiles. Simple!

2.name: Climbing Up
2.description: Use JUMP to reach higher ground. Use F1 to save steps!

3.name: Turn Around
3.description: Turn around and walk forward. Use F1 to save steps!

errors.ERR_PATH_BLOCKED: Path is blocked by an obstacle!
errors.ERR_INVALID_JUMP: Cannot jump: height difference must be exactly 1 level!

welcome.title: Welcome to Stepwise!
welcome.description: Your mission is to guide the character to the goal by planning their movements step by step. Have fun!

commands.title: Action Palette
commands.description: These are the movements you can give to your character.

commandsTwo.title: How to Play
commandsTwo.description: Tap an action to add it to your list. Note: when standing on top of a glowing blue tile, you must use [ACTIVATE] to turn it on.

sequence.title: Your Step List
sequence.description: This is where you'll see the movements you add. They will play in order, from left to right.

sequenceDrag.title: Move & Rearrange
sequenceDrag.description: Don't worry if you make a mistake! You can drag and drop the tiles in your list to easily change their order.

controlButtons.title: Playback Controls
controlButtons.description: Use [PLAY] to make the character move, [STOP] to pause them, or [CLEAR] to wipe everything and start over.

speed.title: Walking Speed
speed.description: Adjust the pacing to make the character walk faster, or slow them down to watch their steps closely.

canvas.title: The Map
canvas.description: This is the game board. Your goal is to light up all the glowing tiles to clear the level.

functions.title: The Special F1 Block
functions.description: You're going to run out of space in your main list! Tap the [F1] tab to open an extra list and save the movements you want to repeat a lot.

functionsTwo.title: Using F1
functionsTwo.description: When you're done, go back to your main list [MAIN] and add the [F1] tile. Every time the game reads [F1], it will repeat all the steps you saved inside it.

functions.title: Second F2 Block
functions.description: The maps are getting bigger! Now you have another extra list called [F2]. Tap its tab to save a different group of steps.

functionsTwo.title: Combining Actions
functionsTwo.description: You can now use both [F1] and [F2] in your main list. Combine them to beat the longest paths using very little space.

pick.title: Break the Blocks!
pick.description: Now you have the [PICK] action. Use it when the character is right on top of a golden block to break it and grab the gold.

pickTwo.title: Gold Rules
pickTwo.description: Watch out! Gold blocks can only be broken once. Make sure to collect all of them before your character runs out of movements.

repeat.title: The REPEAT Command
repeat.description: This instruction multiplies your steps. It automatically repeats the movements you placed right before it.

repeatTwo.title: How to Use REPEAT
repeatTwo.description: First, place the steps you want to repeat, and right after them, add [REPEAT] choosing how many EXTRA times they should run. The character will look back and repeat those same steps that many times.

f3.title: The Third Function: F3
f3.description: Your toolbox is expanding! You've unlocked [F3], a brand new command list to organize your most complex strategies.

f3Two.title: Divide and Conquer
f3Two.description: Now you have three tabs to organize your routines however you like! Combine [F1], [F2], and [F3] in the main list to build massive combinations using very few commands.
